versions.version_description: Corrected Chords in verse, chorus, and bridge.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by Jeconomylan at jeconomylan@gmail.com
Standard tuning in C

NoCapo: [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
capo 3: [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Capo 5: [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Capo 7: [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
It's amazing how you knock me off my feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Every time you come around me I get weak (oh, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Nobody ever made me feel this way (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch] 
You kiss my lips and then you take my breath away[/tab]
So, I wanna know


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (I'd like to know[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (I'd to know[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (So)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Girl he never understood what you were worth (Mm, no)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
And he never took the time to make it work (You deserve more love than that girl)(No)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Baby I'm the kind of man to show concern (Yes I do)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
Anyway that I can please you let me learn[/tab]
So, I wanna know


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (I'd to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (So)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]


[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Tell me what I got to do to please you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Baby anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
From the bottom of my heart its true[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
I wish that I could take a journey through your mind (All right)[/tab]
And find emotions you always try to hide babe (Oh)
I do believe that theres a love you wanna share
I'll take good care of you lady have no fear
So I wanna know


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (I wanna know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (And I'd to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (Ohhh, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile (Oh tell me tell me)[/tab]


[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Tell me what I got to do to please you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Baby anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]
From the bottom of my heart its true[/tab]

(Yeah yeah yeah)


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna know what turns u on (I'd like to know, I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (I wanna know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (Sooo)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile (I'd like to know, I wanna know)[/tab]

Chorus again and fade
